name: Milpitas Chapter
description: Hosted the first Garments4Goodness neighborhood clothing donation drive across Dixon Landing, Beresford, and Folsom.

name: Clovis Chapter
description: Organized a silent clothing drive using word of mouth to collect donations for local community impact.

name: Lathrop Chapter
description: Held a community drive at a local boba shop and collected more than forty bags of clothing.

name: Houston Chapter
description: Hosted a clothing drive at Sharetea Houston to make donation drop-off accessible for local supporters.

name: Louisville Chapter
description: A public Garments4Goodness chapter building local donation and sustainability initiatives.

name: Oceanside Chapter
description: A public Garments4Goodness chapter building local donation and sustainability initiatives.

name: Wabasha Chapter
description: Featured in chapter updates for donation drive work and local outreach. This chapter's Instagram is no longer active.

name: Mountain House Chapter
description: Hosted a first outreach event at Marathi Shala Mahaprasad to introduce Garments4Goodness locally.

name: Kern County Chapter
description: Collected clothing donations through a drive at Independence High School.

name: Bakersfield Chapter
description: A public Garments4Goodness chapter building local donation and sustainability initiatives.

name: Stafford Chapter
description: Ran a donation drive at Brooke Point High School as part of Garments4Goodness chapter growth.

name: San Jose Chapter
description: Collected clothing donations at Leigh High School through a local chapter drive.
